THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT YIM, RAYMOND AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE AND THE ARGUMENTS OF COUNSEL, THE COURT FOUND THERE WAS NO LIABILITY. A STATMENT OF THE COURT FINDINGS WAS MADE ON THE RECORD. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THIS CASE BE DISMISSED.
OPPOSITION PLTF'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT YIM, RAYMOND
AMENDED LAW AND MOTION, MOTION TO TAX COSTS, GRANTED PREVIOUS ORDER TAKING MOTION O/C MADE IN ERROR. CORRECTED ORDER READS AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED, COSTS OF $6814.45 AWARDED TO DEFTS.
